objective: Preserve known PVRIG positive recall while enforcing competition novelty and building a staged, auditable shortlist from 6042 already-docked candidates.

official_competition_alignment.target_mechanism: bind PVRIG extracellular domain at the PVRL2 interface and block PVRIG-PVRL2
official_competition_alignment.cdr_rule: each corresponding VHH CDR identity to any known positive must be <0.80
official_competition_alignment.boundary: all computational values remain priors, not BLI/Kd/IC50/expression/purity measurements

calibration_positive_lane.competition_novelty: expected fail/exclude, never call biological negative

G0_technical_hard: unique candidate ID and matching sequence hash
structure file exists and sequence matches when structure evidence is required
G1_competition_submission_hard: internal safety target max CDR identity <=0.75

hard_or_manual_review: unpaired or unexplained odd cysteine count
multiple orthogonal severe liability signals with structural exposure
warn_and_rank_not_single_metric_blocker_: AbNatiV missing value or moderate score
pI, charge, GRAVY, deamidation, isomerization, oxidation
four cysteines when a plausible additional disulfide is structurally supported
expression_purity_risk_proxy because it is not measured expression or purity

G3_blocker_geometry_high_sensitivity.required_completion: 2 receptor conformations x 3 seeds; at least 2 successful seeds per conformation
G3_blocker_geometry_high_sensitivity.interpretation: high-sensitivity interface plausibility gate only; destructive-control specificity is absent

G4_strict_A_rank_only.interpretation: not a hard gate because recall is too low and false positives remain

binding_and_energy_policy.DeepNano_NanoBind: weak binding priors only; no hard cutoff
binding_and_energy_policy.FoldX_cross_candidate: not recommended for absolute affinity ranking
binding_and_energy_policy.MD_MMGBSA: pending paired positive/control calibration; finalists only

expansion_order: 47 V3 controls under dual-conformation x 3-seed protocol
